include.description: List of glob patterns to include when processing pipeline files

items.description: Glob pattern for files to include (e.g., 'bronze_*.yaml', 'silver/**/*.yaml')

blueprint_include.description: List of glob patterns to include when discovering blueprint files (default: ['blueprints/**/*.yaml'])

items.description: Glob pattern for blueprint files to include

instance_include.description: List of glob patterns to include when discovering blueprint instance files (default: ['pipelines/**/*.yaml']). Instance files normally live alongside hand-written flowgroups under pipelines/<system>/<layer>/; the BlueprintDiscoverer routes by content shape, so overlapping patterns with 'include' are safe.

items.description: Glob pattern for instance files to include

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a bare string is the Spark SQL expression for the column

expression.description: Spark SQL expression for the column

applies_to.description: Which write target types this column applies to

additional_imports.description: Additional imports needed for this column

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a bare list is the list of column names in this preset

columns.description: List of column names in this preset

event_log.description: Project-level event log configuration for pipeline resources

enabled.description: Whether project-level event logging is enabled

catalog.description: Catalog for event log tables (supports LHP substitution tokens)

schema.description: Schema for event log tables (supports LHP substitution tokens)

name_prefix.description: Prefix prepended to pipeline name for event log table name

name_suffix.description: Suffix appended to pipeline name for event log table name

monitoring.description: Event log monitoring pipeline configuration. Generates a notebook with N independent streaming queries plus a SDP pipeline with materialized views. A Databricks Workflow job chains the two.

enabled.description: Whether the monitoring pipeline is enabled

streaming_table.description: Name of the user-created Delta table that event log streams write into

checkpoint_path.description: Base path for streaming checkpoints. Each pipeline gets a subdirectory: {checkpoint_path}/{pipeline_name}/

job_config_path.description: Relative path (from project root) to the dedicated monitoring job config YAML. Required when monitoring.enabled is true (enforced at validation time).

max_concurrent_streams.description: Maximum number of concurrent streaming queries in the union notebook (ThreadPoolExecutor max_workers)

materialized_views.description: List of materialized views to create from the unified event log Delta table

sql.description: Inline SQL for the materialized view

sql_path.description: Path to external SQL file for the materialized view

enable_job_monitoring.description: Enable job monitoring via Databricks SDK (adds jobs_stats materialized view)

uc_tagging.description: Unity Catalog tagging configuration. On by default — this block is optional and only needed to disable the feature or tune it. Users opt in by declaring 'tags' on a table/column; the generated per-pipeline _uc_tagging_hook.py then applies them via the Entity Tag Assignments REST API on pipeline update progress events.

enabled.description: Whether UC tagging is enabled. Defaults to true (on by default, even with no uc_tagging block). Set false to disable the feature entirely.

remove_undeclared_tags.description: When true, reconcile to the declared tag set: existing tags whose keys are not declared in LHP are deleted from managed entities (can remove tags set by other tools). When false (default), tagging is additive only.

tag_update_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent tag operations (the hook's ThreadPoolExecutor max_workers for the one-shot pass over all tables/columns).

test_reporting.description: Test-result reporting configuration. Points at a user-supplied Python callable that publishes test results.

module_path.description: Path to the provider Python file (e.g. src/my_publisher.py)

function_name.description: Name of the callable inside module_path that publishes results

config_file.description: Optional path to a configuration file passed to the provider

wheel.description: Per-project wheel packaging configuration (used by pipelines with packaging: wheel)

artifact_volume.description: Unity Catalog volume path where built wheels are uploaded (e.g. /Volumes/catalog/schema/volume). Supports LHP substitution tokens; the /Volumes/... shape is validated post-substitution.

sandbox.description: Team-level developer-sandbox policy for lhp generate --sandbox

table_pattern.description: Format pattern for sandboxed table leaf names. Must contain both {namespace} and {table}; literal text between placeholders is limited to letters, digits, and underscores.

allowed_envs.description: Environments where sandbox mode is permitted. Omit to allow all environments; an empty list is rejected.

apply_formatting.description: Whether to run the terminal code-formatting pass over generated Python files. Set to false to skip formatting for faster builds; the AST-parse validity guard (LHP-CFG-031) always runs regardless. The CLI --no-format flag overrides this key.
